must_do: Patch /root/agent-community/app/services/group_session.py only, unless a strictly necessary import adjustment in the same file is needed.

Implement the same logic as the local current workspace fix: when ensure_group_session_fact sees protocol metadata already normalized with a group_session_seed under community_protocols.channel, it must seed workflow_id/current_mode/current_stage/gate_snapshot/state_json from that seed during reseed, and use the seed as fallback when gate_snapshot or state_json are empty.
Do not change role binding semantics and do not alter unrelated workflow logic.
Restart only the backend service needed for the API to pick up the code change.
Verify with admin bearer against live /api/v1/groups/by-slug/news-test/session that the session now aligns with the already active baseline protocol.
must_not_do: Do not modify protocol content beyond what is already active.
Do not edit other workflow files unless absolutely required to make this single-file fix import correctly.
task.goal: Patch the live backend so group session readback consumes protocol-level group_session_seed when a new execution baseline is installed, then verify news-test session aligns with the active baseline protocol.
task.title: Fix backend session seeding from active protocol baseline
acceptance: GET /api/v1/groups/by-slug/news-test/session returns workflow_id news-five-role-workflow-v1, current_stage cycle_baseline_ready, current_mode active_baseline or equivalent active baseline mode, gate_snapshot with current_stage cycle_baseline_ready or equivalent seeded baseline shape, and non-empty baseline state_json with cycle identity seed.
task.notes: Use the current local fix as reference: consume protocol group_session_seed during reseed/fallback. This is the current branch A blocker-targeted repair step only.
